items.name: (1.0) Snow Kawaii White Kitty Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Let this fluffy little cloud rest on your shoulder with the Snow Kawaii White Kitty Shoulder Pet. This stretching white cat, with soft pink ears and a cute blushy face, adds a sweet kitty, neko and pastel kawaii vibe to any outfit. Perfect for soft girl looks, cozy sweaters, pastel skirts and aesthetic styles when you want an adorable white kitty riding on your shoulder everywhere you go.

👇 Don’t forget to favorite if you like it!

✨ For more items and matching sets, check my catalog and group!

https://www.roblox.com/communities/35847984/PuffmallowUGC#!/store
